name: chrome-collect
description: 浏览器本地收藏插件 - 一键静态化保存网页

scripts.dev: bun run build:web && cd packages/tray && go run ./cmd/desktop-app --window
scripts.build:ext: powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force dist | Out-Null; if (Test-Path 'dist/chrome-collect-extension.zip') { Remove-Item 'dist/chrome-collect-extension.zip' -Force }; Compress-Archive -Force -Path 'packages/extension/*' -DestinationPath 'dist/chrome-collect-extension.zip'"
scripts.sync:web: powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force dist/resources/web | Out-Null; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'dist/resources/web/*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item -Path 'packages/web/dist/*' -Destination 'dist/resources/web' -Recurse -Force"
scripts.build:desktop: bun run build:web && bun run sync:web && cd packages/tray && go build -ldflags='-H windowsgui -s -w' -o ../../dist/chrome-collect-desktop.exe ./cmd/desktop-app && cd ../..
scripts.build:app: bun run build:desktop && bun run build:native-host
scripts.build: bun run build:app && bun run build:ext
